hero.title: Where Technology Leaders Connect
hero.subtitle: Join 510+ CTOs and technology leaders in Romandy for insightful discussions, networking, and growth opportunities.

who.title: Built for the people building things
who.body: Our name says CTO. Our community is for everyone who thinks at that level. You don't need a specific title. You need to care about the right things: building great products, leading with clarity, and growing through honest conversation.

connect.title: More than a meetup. A community with a pulse.
connect.subtitle: Events are where we meet. Everything between them is where we grow.

events.title: Monthly events
events.body: Curated in-person evenings — keynotes, panels, and open discussion. Small enough to have real conversations. Serious enough to be worth your time.

slack.title: Private Slack
slack.body: Join 500+ peers in our members-only Slack. Ask a question on Tuesday, get five answers from experienced practitioners by Thursday. Candid advice, job opportunities, and conversations that stay in the room.

knowledge.title: Shared knowledge
knowledge.body: Every event generates something lasting — recaps, key takeaways, and resources shared with the full community. Learning doesn't stop when the drinks run out.

nextEvent.title: Innovation in the Luxury Industry
nextEvent.description: Topic and speakers to be announced soon.

topics.title: Real conversations. No fluff.
topics.subtitle: Every session is chosen because it matters to the people in the room — not because it's trending.
topics.leadershipDesc: How to lead engineering teams through growth, change, and pressure — without losing the people you most want to keep.
topics.architectureDesc: What it actually takes to design systems that scale — technically and organizationally. The decisions no architecture diagram shows you.
topics.recruitingDesc: Finding great engineers is hard. Keeping them is harder. Knowing when to let go is harder still. We talk about all three.
topics.technologyDesc: AI, cloud, platforms, emerging tools — when to adopt early, when to wait, and how to build conviction either way.
topics.teamsDesc: Culture, onboarding, rituals, remote vs. in-person — the full picture of what actually makes a team perform.
topics.strategyDesc: How to connect technical decisions to business outcomes, and communicate them clearly to anyone in the room — technical or not.

events.title: Recent Events
events.headline: 23 events. Hundreds of conversations.
events.headlineSub: Each one a reason to show up to the next.
events.subtitle: Browse all past and upcoming Romandy CTO events.

joinDual.title: Two ways in. Both free.
joinDual.subtitle: Start wherever feels right. There's no wrong door.
joinDual.slackBody: Connect with 500+ peers between events. Ask questions, share insights, and stay close to what's happening in the Romandy tech scene — on your schedule, not just on event nights.
joinDual.eventBody: In-person. Curated. Limited to 50 people. This is where the best conversations start — and where you'll meet people you'll still be talking to years later.

join.title: Join Our Community
join.subtitle: Stay connected with 510+ CTOs and technology leaders in Romandy. Get event invitations, community updates, and exclusive insights.
join.benefit1: Be the first to know about upcoming events and reserve your spot before they sell out.
join.benefit2: Receive curated insights, recaps, and resources from each event.
join.benefit3: Connect with CTOs and technology leaders across Romandy, Switzerland.
join.successSub: You'll receive event invitations and community news at your email address.
join.alreadyMember: You're already a member of our community.
join.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
join.privacy: No spam. Unsubscribe at any time.

register.title: Reserve Your Spot
register.subtitle: Fill in your details below to register for this event.
register.successSub: See you at the event. A confirmation will be sent to your email.
register.alreadyRegistered: You're already registered for this event.
register.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

cta.title: Ready to Connect?
cta.subtitle: Join our community of technology leaders in Romandy. Meet peers, share experiences, and grow together.
